case_title: VENTANA PROPERTY SERVICE, INC. VS. S.L.E. CORP. DBA METIER A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED. PERSON APPEARING: JOSEPH MAYDAK, PROPERTY MANAGER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VENTANA PROPERTY SERVICE, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT S.L.E. CORP. DBA METIER A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDGMENT FOR THE DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SHERI EVANS-OWNER.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
